column1: C[SunPin: Anybody in the peanut gallery? I really hope my comment does not disturb the players. If it does, please accept my apologies.
thouis: Spectator chat is invisible to the players until the end of the game
SunPin: Very good. Thank you, sirs.
C[matburt: high Dans make the most interesting shapes
C[thouis: Whenever I play interesting shapes, they're bad.
C[thouis: How does the voice thing work?  Can one just listen?
C[afar: But is it possible to turn on just-listen mode?
matburt: afar, there are controls on it when you click it... just mute it
dmf: just cick the stop button on your thingie
afar: matburt: So I click the speaker on my own bar, and that mutes me?
afar: Sorry, I just want to be totally sure to get it right
thouis: (oh, I missed the popup asking permissiong)
matburt: if you click the speaker icon you'll see a slash go through it
C[afar: I don't see a slash...I see the noise semicircles disappear
matburt: hmm... on mine those go away and a slash is through the speaker
matburt: you can also mute other people
afar: What about the pause and play button?
C[afar: What does that mean, given it's a live stream?
C[thouis: turn on and off that person's voice
matburt: hmm, good question... I might toss that one over to anoek :)
C[afar: thouis: That's what I would expect, except there's also a mute button. Maybe it's just an implementation thing
C[matburt: this is a new feature on nova, so use the ""Help"" -> ""Feedback"" link to help us improve it
C[matburt: (that is the best way to leave feedback)
C[afar: I do really like the general idea, it's basically perfect
C[afar: And the kind of thing I'm jealous of chess servers for
matburt: it already works pretty well here
C[afar: I haven't actually heard anything yet...has anyone been speaking?
C[matburt: I think we could hear thouis typing and someone speaking french out of dromar56?
C[dromar56: ah yeah sorry, that was my roommate
C[dromar56: at first I didn't understood, I though one of you was talkling french
thouis: Sorry.  I thought I was muted.
afar: Hmm, I didn't catch any of it, maybe something is wrong
C[afar: I do have lots of audio providers registered to pulseaudio, so I guess it isn't that for once
C[matburt: dmf, afar... what browsers are you guys using?  We use webrtc... it's a fairly new thing
matburt: on chrome here it works pretty well
C[matburt: on ie it doesn't work at all
matburt: get dromar56 to talk in french to you!

column2: ) i would like to practice my english actually

column1: matburt: It's awesome... something I would never here sitting in my office in North Carolina :D
C[thouis: I heard that.  very garbled, though.
afar: Hmm...chromium I don't see any audio controls and no sound providers register with pulseaudio
C[matburt: make sure you click on the mic icon
C[thouis: afar: is there a bar at the top asking to use your mic?
dmf: so, the speaker icon from MY bar is for what?
matburt: did you click to allow chromium access?
C[afar: Oh, good point, I didn't even get the access question popup
afar: Hurray, it works having upgraded chromium
thouis: This conversation is going to be as confusing to the players as their game is to us.
C[dmf: and the play icon from my bar?
afar: I wonder why firefox failed through...maybe their implementation isn't done yet
C[matburt: afar are you using a recent FF?
dmf: too bad it doesn't show who's talking
C[afar: matburt: Yeah, totally up to date
matburt: dmf is the one watching tv :)
C[matburt: I think muting anyone mutes everyone
thouis: It's not TV.  A go lecture.
matburt: well, we do have some bugs on this... we're working on them :)
thouis: I'm glad high dans make dumpling shapes sometimes, too.

C[thouis: Even paying attention, I have no idea, either.
